description: Request body to dispatch an autonomous refactoring run (POST /v1/refactor/autonomous, refactor_routes.py). Crosses the API boundary; constitutionally required to carry a governing schema (ADR-056 D7). 'goal' is required.

goal.description: Natural-language description of the refactoring objective.

write.description: When false (default), dry-run only. When true, write changes to disk.
